item.name: Canal Bream
item.description:
A small saltwater fish found in the waterways of Canal Town. Its saucer-like eyes seem somewhat disproportionate to its size.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin was a popular source of food in the port settlement Canal Town was based on. It is said that young chefs tasked with filleting the fish were often put off by its large, posthumously watchful eyes.
